text_zh: 不错。去发现你的性癖吧！
reply_original: Wow, thank you for the 4-star review! We are thrilled that you are enjoying the journey of discovery and finding your "kink" with our characters. Fantasia is all about exploring those unique connections! If you ever have suggestions or run into issues, feel free to reach us at support@fantachat.ai. Have fun exploring!
reply_zh: 哇，感谢您的四星好评！我们很高兴您能享受这段探索之旅，并与我们的角色一起发现您的“癖好”。Fantasia 的宗旨就是探索那些独特的连接！如果您有任何建议或遇到问题，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们联系。祝您探索愉快！
